arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s possible team against Sevilla in LaLiga
arts.sum: Brahim is expected to complete a front three alongside Kylian Mbappé on the left wing—“his adaptation period is over; I see him more motivated now,” Ancelotti recently stated—and Rodrygo, likely starting as the central striker. However, during certain phases of the game, Mbappé could take on the central role, with Rodrygo shifting to the flank, depending on the flow of the match.
